   FROM staff_profiles sp
  WHERE ((sp.id = auth.uid()) AND (lower(COALESCE(sp.app_role, ''::text)) = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::text, 'ceo'::text]))))) AND (lower(category) = 'billing'::text) AND (lower(document_type) = 'client_invoice'::text) AND (source_page = 'admin_parent_invoices'::text))
